results.query: In what year did the International Game Fish Association begin keeping freshwater fishing records after receiving data from Field & Stream?
results.predicted:
The International Game Fish Association (IGFA) began keeping freshwater fishing records in **1978**, after receiving 68 years of records from *Field & Stream*.

This is stated in the text:  
> “Recognized as the official keeper of world saltwater fishing records since 1939, IGFA entered the field of freshwater record keeping when *Field & Stream* transferred its 68 years of records to the association in 1978.”[2]

results.query: Who was the lead designer behind the development of the experimental Soviet Obiekt 287 missile tank?
results.predicted: The lead designer behind the development of the experimental Soviet Obiekt 287 missile tank was **Josef Kotin**. He was the head of the Leningrad Kirov Plant (LKZ) and led the project, which was developed as a prototype based on the Object 432 chassis in 1965.
